intended_use_full: SIGNA MAGNUS system is a head-only magnetic resonance scanner designed to support high resolution, high signal-to-noise ratio, diffusion-weighted imaging, and short scan times. SIGNA MAGNUS is indicated for use as a diagnostic imaging device to produce axial, sagittal, coronal, and oblique images, spectroscopic images, parametric maps, and/or spectra, dynamic images of the structures and/or functions of the head, neck, TMJ, and limited cervical spine on patients 6 years of age and older.
other_metrics: Peak gradient amplitude: 300 mT/m; Peak gradient slew rate: 750 T/m/s; Receive channels: 64; Maximum RF power output: 7.5 kW; Field-of-view: 26cm x 26cm x 26cm; Patient bore diameter at head: 37 cm
